update.esphome_updated: ESPHome has been updated to version {version}.
update.esphome_updated_dev: ESPHome has been updated to the latest dev version.
update.esphome_partial: ESPHome updated to {version}, but failed to restart dashboard: {error}
update.available_prompt:
{subject} is available.

You currently have version {installed}.

Would you like to update now?
update.dev_channel_prompt:
You are on the dev channel.

Currently installed: {version}

This will reinstall ESPHome from the latest commit on GitHub.

Would you like to update now?
update.builder_update_failed: Failed to update ESPHome Device Builder: {error}
update.builder_updated: ESPHome Device Builder has been updated to version {version}.
update.builder_partial: Device builder updated to {version}, but failed to restart backend: {error}

app_update.prompt:
ESPHome Device Builder {new} is available.

You currently have version {current}.

Would you like to download and install it now?
app_update.prompt_with_notes:
ESPHome Device Builder {new} is available.

You currently have version {current}.

Release notes:
{notes}

Would you like to download and install it now?
app_update.latest: ESPHome Device Builder {version} is the latest version.
app_update.installed_body:
ESPHome Device Builder {version} has been installed.

It will now restart to apply the update.

switch_channel.title: Switch Release Channel
switch_channel.dev_warning: Warning: The dev channel installs ESPHome directly from GitHub and does NOT support automatic updates. You will need to manually check for updates.
switch_channel.prompt:
Switch ESPHome from {old} to {new} channel?

This will stop the dashboard, install the appropriate version, and restart.
switch_channel.switched: Successfully switched to the {channel} release channel.
switch_channel.partial: Switched to {channel} channel, but failed to restart dashboard: {error}

switch_backend.title: Switch Backend
switch_backend.prompt:
Switch to {backend}?

This will install the `esphome-device-builder` Python package, stop the current backend, and restart with the new one.
switch_backend.not_ready: Switched to {backend}, but it didn't become ready in time. Check the logs.

daemon.stopped_body: {backend} exited unexpectedly ({status}). Open the tray menu and choose "View Logs..." for details.

git_check.missing_body: ESPHome uses Git to download external components, remote (github://) packages, voice models, and other dependencies, so many configurations won't compile without it. Install Git, then restart ESPHome Device Builder so it can detect it.
git_check.missing_body_macos: ESPHome uses Git to download external components, remote (github://) packages, voice models, and other dependencies, so many configurations won't compile without it. macOS is opening its Command Line Tools installer, which includes Git — finish that install, then restart ESPHome Device Builder so it can detect it.
git_check.parent_repo_title: A parent folder is a Git repository
git_check.parent_repo_body: Your ESPHome configuration ({config_dir}) sits inside a Git repository rooted at {repo_root}. ESP-IDF builds can pick up that repository and fail to compile with an opaque CMake "head-ref" error. If your devices fail to build, remove the stray .git entry (file or folder) from that repository root, or move your ESPHome configuration outside that repository.

platform.remove_legacy_prompt:
An older version of this app named “ESPHome Builder” was found in your Applications folder. Move it to the Trash?

Your settings and configs are not affected.

hint.updates_menu: Open the tray menu and choose "Check for Updates..." to update.
hint.updates_cli: No system tray was detected. Run `esphome-desktop update` from a terminal to update.
